sentences.arabic: تُجَسِّدُ العِمَارَةُ الإِسْلَامِيَّةُ فِي الأَنْدَلُسِ ذِرْوَةَ التَّلَاقِي الثَّقَافِيِّ وَالفَنِّيِّ بَيْنَ الشَّرْقِ وَالغَرْبِ خِلَالَ العُصُورِ الوُسْطَى المَجِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Islamska arhitektura u Andaluziji utjelovljuje vrhunac kulturnog i umjetničkog susreta Istoka i Zapada tokom slavnog srednjeg vijeka.
sentences.translationEn: Islamic architecture in Andalusia embodies the pinnacle of cultural and artistic convergence between East and West during the glorious Middle Ages.

sentences.arabic: تَظْهَرُ بَرَاعَةُ المُهَنْدِسِينَ فِي اسْتِخْدَامِ الزَّخَارِفِ الهَنْدَسِيَّةِ المُعَقَّدَةِ وَالخُطُوطِ العَرَبِيَّةِ الَّتِي تُزَيِّنُ جُدْرَانَ القُصُورِ وَالمَسَاجِدِ بِدِقَّةٍ مُتَنَاهِيَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Vještina inženjera ogleda se u upotrebi složenih geometrijskih ornamenata i arapske kaligrafije koja s krajnjom preciznošću ukrašava zidove palata i džamija.
sentences.translationEn: The ingenuity of engineers appears in the use of complex geometric patterns and Arabic calligraphy that adorns the walls of palaces and mosques with extreme precision.

sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ الحَمْرَاءُ فِي غَرْنَاطَةَ نَمُوذَجًا حَيًّا لِهَذَا الإِبْدَاعِ، حَيْثُ تَتَنَاغَمُ المِيَاهُ الجَارِيَةُ فِي النَّوَافِيرِ مَعَ الضَّوْءِ المُنْسَابِ عَبْرَ الأَقْوَاسِ المَرْسُومَةِ.
sentences.translation: Alhambra u Granadi smatra se živim primjerom ove kreativnosti, gdje se tekuća voda u fontanama harmonizira sa svjetlošću koja struji kroz iscrtane lukove.
sentences.translationEn: The Alhambra in Granada is considered a living model of this creativity, where running water in fountains harmonizes with light flowing through the painted arches.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَكُنِ البِنَاءُ فِي ذَلِكَ العَصْرِ مُجَرَّدَ مَسْكَنٍ لِلْعَيْشِ، بَلْ كَانَ تَعْبِيرًا عَنِ الفَلْسَفَةِ الرُّوحِيَّةِ الَّتِي تَبْحَثُ عَنِ التَّوَازُنِ وَالجَمَالِ.
sentences.translation: Gradnja u to doba nije bila samo prostor za stanovanje, već izraz duhovne filozofije koja traga za ravnotežom i ljepotom.
sentences.translationEn: Building in that era was not just a residence for living, but rather an expression of the spiritual philosophy seeking balance and beauty.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ المَعَالِمُ التَّارِيخِيَّةُ لَا تَزَالُ تَجْذِبُ الآلَافَ مِنَ الزُّوَّارِ سَنَوِيًّا لِيَتَأَمَّلُوا فِي عَظَمَةِ حَضَارَةٍ دَامَتْ لِثَمَانِيَةِ قُرُونٍ.
sentences.translation: Ove historijske znamenitosti i dalje privlače hiljade posjetitelja godišnje da razmišljaju o veličini civilizacije koja je trajala osam vijekova.
sentences.translationEn: These historical landmarks still attract thousands of visitors annually to contemplate the greatness of a civilization that lasted for eight centuries.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَفَاصِيلَ الفُسَيْفِسَاءِ وَالرُّخَامِ تَرْوِي قِصَصًا صَامِتَةً عَنْ عَصْرٍ ذَهَبِيٍّ ازْدَهَرَتْ فِيهِ العُلُومُ وَالفُنُونُ بِشَكْلٍ لَا مَثِيلَ لَهُ.
sentences.translation: Detalji mozaika i mramora pričaju nijeme priče o zlatnom dobu u kojem su nauka i umjetnost cvjetale na neprevaziđen način.
sentences.translationEn: The details of mosaic and marble tell silent stories about a golden age in which sciences and arts flourished in an unparalleled way.
